info.description: Configuration for automated KPI threshold monitoring and alerting.

kpiName.description: The KPI metric being monitored, corresponding to a key in the Analytics Service.

threshold.description: The target value that defines the alert boundary (e.g., 70%).

operator.description: The comparison operator used against the current KPI value.

alertType.description: The severity level to assign if the threshold is breached.

evaluationPeriod.description: How often the backend service checks this rule against the live data.

enabled.description: Toggle to activate or pause the rule.

branch.description: Optional: If set, the rule is applied only to this specific branch (local rule).
